# Accounting Core Module

Module ID: accounting-core
Status: draft
Purpose: Tenant-scoped double-entry accounting foundation with chart of accounts, fiscal periods, balanced posting, voiding, and trial balance.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build
Test: pnpm test
Owned tables: accounting_accounts, accounting_fiscal_periods, accounting_journal_entries, accounting_journal_lines, domain_events
Primary use cases: createAccount, listAccounts, createFiscalPeriod, updateFiscalPeriodStatus, createJournalEntry, updateJournalEntry, postJournalEntry, voidJournalEntry, getTrialBalance
Invariants: tenant-scoped records, integer cents, balanced journals, immutable posted entries, closed/locked periods reject posting, posted sourceRef uniqueness, voids create reversal metadata and a posted reversal entry instead of deleting lines.
